room.caption: [BubTowerA4] It actually bugged me a bit that it happened at the time it did and I almost removed this level.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="The idle one is like a ghost." signSize=1
stringToShow="Don't be afraid to reset the room if a mishap occurs." signSize=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=16 xDir=0 yDir=2 shiftChange=40 spriteChange=13 towerColor=64
